metadata.description: Agent skills for Azure SQL Developer: the Azure SQL Database engine, running locally in a container.

plugins.name: azure-sql-developer
plugins.description: Eleven skills that teach an AI coding agent to use Azure SQL Developer correctly: start the engine, connect, migrate schemas, import data, scaffold apps, build local RAG, wire CI, run as a sidecar, go local-to-cloud, answer FAQs, and report issues.
